response:
This April investor update shares the company has reached its 10K monthly active user milestone, closed an $8M Series A term sheet at a $40M pre-money valuation, hired a VP of Sales, and reported key metrics including $85K monthly recurring revenue, $120K monthly burn rate, and 11 months of projected runway following the raise.
The update also confirms the Series A fundraising round is scheduled to formally close on May 10.
